title: Cybernetics: Or Control and Communication in the Animal and the Machine

description.en: Foundational reference for feedback loops and cybernetic reasoning in social and technical systems.
description.es: Referencia fundacional para bucles de retroalimentacion y razonamiento cibernetico en sistemas sociales y tecnicos.

description.en: Second-order cybernetics on observers, reflexivity, and operational closure.
description.es: Cibernetica de segundo orden sobre observadores, reflexividad y clausura operacional.

title: Steps to an Ecology of Mind

description.en: Cross-disciplinary essays linking communication patterns with ecological thought.
description.es: Ensayos transdisciplinarios que vinculan patrones de comunicacion con pensamiento ecologico.

title: Mind and Nature: A Necessary Unity

description.en: Bateson's synthesis of mind, pattern, and ecological interdependence.
description.es: Sintesis de Bateson sobre mente, patron e interdependencia ecologica.

title: The Question Concerning Technology in China

description.en: Introduces cosmotechnics as a plural framework for technical modernity.
description.es: Introduce la cosmotecnica como marco plural para la modernidad tecnica.

description.en: Philosophical account of recursion as technical and epistemic condition.
description.es: Analisis filosofico de la recursion como condicion tecnica y epistemica.

description.en: Speculative and situated proposals for multispecies collaboration.
description.es: Propuestas especulativas y situadas para colaboracion multiespecie.

description.en: Analysis of behavioral extraction and platform power.
description.es: Analisis de extraccion conductual y poder de plataformas.

description.en: Classic critique of industrial institutions and scale.
description.es: Critica clasica de instituciones industriales y escala.

description.en: Critical pedagogy model for dialogic emancipation.
description.es: Modelo de pedagogia critica para emancipacion dialogica.

description.en: Historical account of extraction and dependency in Latin America.
description.es: Relato historico de extraccion y dependencia en America Latina.

description.en: Framework for participatory design led by impacted communities.
description.es: Marco de diseno participativo liderado por comunidades afectadas.

description.en: Seminal paper on embodied and partial objectivity.
description.es: Articulo seminal sobre objetividad encarnada y parcial.

description.en: Decolonial critique of dominant AI paradigms and infrastructures.
description.es: Critica decolonial de paradigmas e infraestructuras dominantes de IA.

description.en: Proposal for design practices rooted in relational worlds.
description.es: Propuesta de practicas de diseno arraigadas en mundos relacionales.

description.en: Concept of non-synthetic coexistence between heterogenous realities.
description.es: Concepto de coexistencia no sintetica entre realidades heterogeneas.

description.en: Relational horizon for collective life beyond extractivist development.
description.es: Horizonte relacional para vida colectiva mas alla del desarrollo extractivista.

description.en: Proposal to think technologies through situated cosmologies.
description.es: Propuesta para pensar tecnologias desde cosmologias situadas.

description.en: Concept describing systemic rupture between social and ecological cycles.
description.es: Concepto que describe la ruptura sistemica entre ciclos sociales y ecologicos.

description.en: Extends colonial critique to contemporary data extraction regimes.
description.es: Extiende la critica colonial a regimenes contemporaneos de extraccion de datos.

description.en: Approach to shared infrastructures governed as commons.
description.es: Enfoque de infraestructuras compartidas gobernadas como comunes.

description.en: Relational ethical principle centered on interdependence.
description.es: Principio etico relacional centrado en la interdependencia.

description.en: Critical and experimental framework at the intersection of gender and technics.
description.es: Marco critico y experimental en la interseccion entre genero y tecnicas.

description.en: Policy framework for rights-based AI governance.

description.es: Modelo para propiedad democratica de plataformas digitales.

description.en: Combines material prototyping with critical reflection.
description.es: Combina prototipado material con reflexion critica.

title: Exocapitalism: Economies with Absolutely No Limits

description.en: Contemporary analysis of platform capital, arbitrage systems, and post-labor economic dynamics.
description.es: Analisis contemporaneo del capital de plataformas, sistemas de arbitraje y dinamicas economicas post-laborales.

description.en: Forecast on digital networks, monetary change, and the shifting balance between state power and individuals.
description.es: Pronostico sobre redes digitales, cambio monetario y el desplazamiento del poder entre Estado e individuos.
